topic: There are wet footprints leading away from my backyard pool but the pool has been drained for six years
title: Wet Footprints Lead Out of My Pool. It Has Been Drained Six Years. | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: There are wet footprints leading away from my backyard pool. The pool has been drained six years.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of an empty backyard in ground concrete pool at dusk, dry leaves at the bottom, wet bare footprints leading away from the edge across the patio, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Small yard. In ground concrete pool. Drained when my father died.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior of a small fenced suburban backyard with an empty drained concrete swimming pool, weathered patio furniture stacked beside it, late afternoon light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of the bottom of an empty concrete pool filled with cardboard boxes and old lawn chairs, dim afternoon light slanting in from above, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Found wet prints on the patio. They came from inside the pool.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of wet bare footprints on a concrete patio leading from the pool edge outward, the prints dark against the dry surface, late evening light, vertical 9:16 framing
wide shot of a backyard at twilight with completely dry patio stones and dry grass, no water source visible, the sky clear, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Adult size. Bare feet. Six clear prints.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of six distinct wet bare adult footprints across a dry concrete patio, the prints visibly fading toward the edge of frame, vertical 9:16 framing
wide shot from the deep end of an empty concrete pool looking up at the sky and the edge of the patio, a metal ladder hanging into the basin, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The drain was dry. The walls were dry.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a circular drain at the bottom of a drained pool, the metal grate completely dry and clean, no moisture visible around it, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Bleached the patio. Locked the gate. Waited a week.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a backyard gate with a heavy padlock and chain wrapped around it at dusk, the patio beyond visibly scrubbed clean, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: New prints last Thursday. Wet. From inside the pool. The gate was still locked.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a backyard patio with a fresh trail of wet bare footprints leading from a drained pool toward a locked gate, no figures visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I filled the pool with sand.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a drained concrete pool filled level with fine pale sand, the surface raked smooth, late afternoon light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: There are wet prints in the sand now.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of damp bare footprints pressed into pale sand at the surface of a filled in pool, the prints leading toward the patio edge, dim evening light, vertical 9:16 framing
